{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Union powered armor
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Sola]]'s armor looks like standard-issue [[Union powered armor]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
